description: An infographic with a bullet list in a navy-blue palette. The background is a deep blue gradient with a large, faint watermark of the U.S. Department of Labor seal. At top center is the white DOL seal ('DEPARTMENT OF LABOR / UNITED STATES OF AMERICA'). Beneath it, white text reads 'U.S. Department of Labor' (bold serif) and 'Self-Audit Initiative:' (italic serif, underlined with a small decorative line). Four checkmark-box bullet points in white small-caps serif read: 'IDENTIFIES & FIXES POTENTIAL VIOLATIONS', 'REDUCES LIKELIHOOD OF INVESTIGATION', 'DEMONSTRATES GOOD-FAITH COMMITMENT TO THE LAW', and 'ENSURES WORKER SAFETY & SECURITY'. Centered at the bottom in white caps: 'VISIT DOL.GOV/SELFAUDIT'.
notable_text: U.S. Department of Labor Self-Audit Initiative: Identifies & fixes potential violations / Reduces likelihood of investigation / Demonstrates good-faith commitment to the law / Ensures worker safety & security / VISIT DOL.GOV/SELFAUDIT
